🌐 Netplay — Co-op with a Friend

🎨 Color Theme
🎯 Pokémon Team → Showdown Export
Load a Gen 3 Pokémon ROM, then click Read From Emulator.
Supports Ruby/Sapphire/Emerald/FireRed/LeafGreen + FireRed-engine ROM hacks (Pokémon Lazorus, Radical Red, Unbound, Gaia, etc.). Reads the live battery save (SRAM) — if you don't see recent changes, save in-game first (Start → SAVE). Custom fakemon may appear as Species#N.
☁ Cloud Sync — Saves, Slots & Settings Across Devices

📦 Backup Bundle no-setup

One-file backup of everything: battery saves (SRAM), save-state slots, cheats, achievements, settings & game history. Email it to yourself or drop it on a USB — restore on any device in one click.

🔄 Cross-Device Cloud Sync sign in required

Saves, slot states, cheats & settings sync to your account (powered by our backend — not Google Drive). Sign into the same account on any browser or device and your data is restored automatically the first time. Use Sync Now after big sessions, or turn on Auto. If something looks wrong, click Diagnose.
Sign in to your account to sync saves across devices.
